description_long: This is a freestanding kitchen oven with a four-burner gas stovetop and a large front-facing oven compartment. The exterior is primarily metallic silver with a black control panel and black burner grates. The control panel is located at the back above the stovetop and features four round knobs and a dark display area. The oven door has a wide, rectangular black window, allowing visibility into the oven's interior. The handle is a horizontal bar mounted above the window, blending seamlessly with the door's design. The overall form is boxy and robust, typical of standard residential ovens found in urban kitchens or utility spaces.
description: A metallic silver oven with a four-burner gas stovetop, black control panel, and a large front windowed door. Features a horizontal handle and a robust, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oven door with a large black window, four control knobs, and the full control panel above the stovetop.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the oven, the stovetop burners, and the side profile of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain metallic back with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Left side view similar to the right, showing the stovetop burners and the side of the control panel.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is a rectangular black section at the back of the oven, featuring four evenly spaced round knobs along the lower edge. To the right of the knobs is a dark, possibly digital display area with no visible text or icons. The panel is simple, with no visible labels or additional buttons.
attribute_door_handle_type: The door handle is a straight, horizontal bar mounted above the oven window, integrated into the door's design. It appears to be metallic, matching the oven's silver finish, and is slightly protruding for ergonomic grip.
attribute_window_presence: present, a large rectangular window centered on the oven door, occupying most of the door's upper half.
